source_pr.title: ddl: Support ALTER DATABASE Placement Policy/ DirectOptions
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Fixes https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/27975

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

Proposal: [xxx](url) <!-- REMOVE this line if not applicable -->

What's Changed:

How it Works:

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [x] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

```release-note
Support ALTER DATABASE Placement Policy/ DirectOptions
```

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to leaked shared state between tests: placement policies (`x`/`y`) can persist across runs, so `CREATE PLACEMENT POLICY ...` may intermittently fail if previous tests left these objects behind. This PR stabilizes it by proactively dropping the policies if they already exist before/after the test.
fix_pattern: Drop placement policies (and other shared DB objects) with `IF EXISTS` before/after the test to avoid cross-test pollution.

evidence: files: br/pkg/restore/log_client.go, ddl/ddl_api.go, ddl/ddl_worker.go, ddl/ddl_worker_test.go, ddl/placement_policy_test.go, ddl/placement_sql_test.go, ddl/rollingback.go, ddl/schema.go, executor/show.go, go.mod, go.sum, infoschema/builder.go, util/admin/admin.go
